message:
fix: remove unused imports and fix compilation errors from concurrent agent changes (bd-3ar8v.4.4)

- Remove unused `extension_event_from_agent` imports from main.rs, rpc.rs,
  interactive.rs (now superseded by dispatch_agent_event_lazy on EventCoalescer)
- Add TestNullSession + test_register_payload helper in extensions.rs test
  module (NullSession was removed by another agent, RegisterPayload lost Default)
- Fix borrow-of-moved-value in session_store_v2.rs (while let Some(ref entry_id))
- Apply clippy auto-fixes in session_store_v2.rs (map_or_else, clone_from, const fn)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
